scripts.docker:run-staging: docker run --env-file .env --name hss -p 3000:3000 -v $(pwd):/app house-staff-server:$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
scripts.docker:build-staging: docker build --target=dev -t house-staff-server:$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) -t house-staff-server:latest .
scripts.docker:remove-staging: docker rm -f hss && docker rmi house-staff-server:$(git rev-parse --short HEAD)
scripts.docker:compose-up-dev: IMAGE_TAG=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker-compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up --build
scripts.docker:compose-up-prod: IMAGE_TAG=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up --build
